'; sed -n '1,120p' evals/effectiveness/reports/adversarial-prompt-injection-001/sdk-stage-logs/adversarial-dev-worker-smoke-exact-stdout.log; printf '
--- stderr
'; sed -n '1,120p' evals/effectiveness/reports/adversarial-prompt-injection-001/sdk-stage-logs/adversarial-dev-worker-smoke-exact-stderr.log
